[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111001101 6
1 0100011001 4
2 1011010011 6
3 0111000001 4
4 0111001101 6
5 1110101111 8
6 1111111011 9
7 0011111011 7
